name: Kira Shadowstep
notes: Test character — Rogue 5. Sneak Attack 3d6, Cunning Action, Uncanny Dodge.

level1Features.name: Expertise
level1Features.description: Double proficiency on two skills or tools.

level1Features.name: Sneak Attack
level1Features.description: 3d6 extra damage once per turn when attacking with advantage or when an ally is adjacent to target.

level1Features.name: Thieves' Cant
level1Features.description: Secret mix of dialect and code words.

allFeatures.name: Expertise
allFeatures.description: Double proficiency on two skills or tools.

allFeatures.name: Thieves' Cant
allFeatures.description: Secret mix of dialect and code words.

allFeatures.name: Cunning Action
allFeatures.description: Bonus action: Dash, Disengage, or Hide each turn.

allFeatures.name: Uncanny Dodge
allFeatures.description: Reaction: halve the damage from one attack per turn.

allFeatures.name: Lucky
allFeatures.description: Reroll 1s on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws (Halfling racial).

allFeatures.name: Fast Hands (Thief)
allFeatures.description: Use Cunning Action to use Sleight of Hand, use Thieves' Tools, or take the Use an Object action.

allFeatures.name: Second-Story Work (Thief)
allFeatures.description: Climbing costs no extra movement; add DEX to jump distance.

backgroundFeature: Criminal Contact: You have a reliable contact in the criminal underworld.
